# Nweke Manuchimso Emmanuel — Portfolio

> Next.js Developer and Frontend Developer in Nigeria specializing in React, responsive web design, web performance optimization, and technical writing. Available for hire — freelance and full-time.

## About

Nweke Manuchimso Emmanuel (also known as Nweke Manuchimso, Nweke Emmanuel Manuchimso, Nweke Emmanuel Nweke Manuchimso) is a Front-End Developer and Technical Writer based in Nigeria. He builds modern, responsive web applications and writes technical articles that make complex concepts accessible.

- Website: https://manuchim.site
- GitHub: https://github.com/Manuel-co
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/NwekeManuchimso
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nweke-emmanuel-435a3923b/
- Medium: https://medium.com/@manuchimsoemmanuel2k
- Email: manuchimsoemmanuel2k@gmail.com

## Skills

- **Front-End Development**: React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3, Responsive Design, UI/UX, Accessibility
- **Technical Writing**: Documentation, Tutorials, API Docs, Technical Blogs, User Guides, Content Strategy, Markdown
- **Web3 Development**: Ethereum, Solidity, Smart Contracts, DApps, Web3.js, Ethers.js, Hardhat, IPFS

## Projects

- [Shax_x Photography Portfolio](https://shax-x.vercel.app/) — Modern photography portfolio built with Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion
- [File Sharing App](https://file-share-nine-pi.vercel.app/) — Secure file sharing with role-based access control using Next.js, AWS, Firebase, and Permit.io
- [AniNews](https://aninews-blond.vercel.app/) — Anime discovery site powered by the Anime News Network API, built with Next.js and Zustand
- [Anime News Landing](https://news-anime.vercel.app/) — API documentation landing page for the Anime News Network Encyclopedia API
- [Subtitle Translator](https://subtitle-translator.vercel.app/) — SRT subtitle translation app using the LibreTranslate API
- [PH Estate](https://phestate.vercel.app/) — Real estate listing site for Port Harcourt, Nigeria
- [Ziron Projects](https://zironprojects.com/) — Professional website for an engineering group in the Niger Delta
